title: DayCounter +
description: A day counter mod for Minecraft with customizable position and toggle options.
body:
**DayCounter +**

DayCounter + is a simple and customizable day counter mod for Minecraft that helps you keep track of how many in-game days have passed in your world.

## Features:

- Display the current day count on your HUD
- Customize the counter position on your screen
- Toggle the display on/off
- Lightweight and performance-friendly

## Key bindings:

    K key: Counter on/off
    O key: Settings screen

## Multiplayer Support:
This MOD is generally compatible with multiplayer! However, it may not function properly in multiplayer.

## Perfect for:

-  Players who want to track their survival progress
-  Speedrunners monitoring their time
-  Anyone who likes to keep track of their world statistics
